title: dryopteris apicalis
intro: Dryopteris apicalis, also known as the Chinese golden shield fern, is a species of fern native to China and Japan. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Dryopteris apicalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
